title: Feline Update #2
content:
Now that the cats have made themselves comfortable in my backyard ...

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/11/cats_02.jpg)

...  I might just as well feed them.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/11/cats_01.jpg)

The cats still do not want to get acquainted though. :P
